_comment: Customer catalog extracted from the new frontend (fruit-splash-showcase) src/data/products.ts. Maps to product + product_variant + product_price. category: Classic->regular, Special->special. Variant prices: regular = 330ml 2500 / 650ml 3500; special = 330ml 4500 / 650ml 4500. 'cluster' is a frontend decoration hint, kept for parity.

products.name: Sunrise Blend
products.tagline: Carrot, pawpaw, orange & pineapple at first light.

ingredient_details.name: Carrot
ingredient_details.benefit: Beta-carotene for clear skin and sharp eyes.

ingredient_details.name: Pawpaw
ingredient_details.benefit: Digestive enzymes; gentle on the gut.

ingredient_details.name: Orange
ingredient_details.benefit: Vitamin C — immunity and morning lift.

products.story: The blend Mrs. Samuel wakes up to. Pressed before sunrise so every bottle reaches you with the day's first energy still in it.
products.pairing: Drink chilled with breakfast — eggs, akara, or fruit and yoghurt.

products.name: Crimson Garden Glow
products.tagline: Garden vegetables blended with apple sweetness.

ingredient_details.name: Beetroot
ingredient_details.benefit: Iron and nitrates for blood and stamina.

ingredient_details.name: Carrot
ingredient_details.benefit: Beta-carotene for clear skin and sharp eyes.

products.story: Our garden in a bottle. Five plants, no shortcuts — the beetroot earthiness gets balanced by apple and pineapple so even beetroot-sceptics ask for seconds.
products.pairing: Mid-afternoon, on an empty-ish stomach, when energy dips.

products.name: Crimson Elixir
products.tagline: Beetroot, pineapple and watermelon — earthy and bright.

ingredient_details.name: Beetroot
ingredient_details.benefit: Iron and nitrates for blood and stamina.

products.story: For the friends who train hard and the ones who just want to feel strong. Beetroot's nitrates lift stamina; watermelon keeps it cooling.
products.pairing: 30 minutes before a workout, or with grilled fish.

products.name: Crimson Cooler
products.tagline: Watermelon and beetroot, balanced with carrot.

ingredient_details.name: Beetroot
ingredient_details.benefit: Iron and nitrates for blood and stamina.

ingredient_details.name: Carrot
ingredient_details.benefit: Beta-carotene for clear skin and sharp eyes.

products.story: The bottle our customers describe as 'tasting like summer.' Watermelon softens beetroot the way Mrs. Samuel intended.
products.pairing: Anytime the sun's out. Especially with peppered fish.

products.name: Ginger Spark
products.tagline: Watermelon and pineapple with a ginger snap.
products.story: Sweet, then heat. The ginger sneaks up — not too much, just enough to wake you up.
products.pairing: Before a long drive or a long meeting.

products.name: Orange Juice
products.tagline: Hand-pressed Nigerian oranges. Nothing else.

ingredient_details.name: Orange
ingredient_details.benefit: Vitamin C — immunity and morning lift.

products.story: Single ingredient, single origin — Benue oranges, pressed within hours of arriving in Lagos. No water, no sugar, nothing else.
products.pairing: Breakfast. Always breakfast.

products.name: Pineapple Juice
products.tagline: Pure, golden pineapple pressed at sunrise.
products.story: Sweet enough on its own. We just press and bottle — the pineapple does the rest.
products.pairing: Brunch, weekend cocktails (non-alcoholic mixers).

products.name: Pinecado Bliss
products.tagline: Silky avocado folded into bright pineapple.
products.story: Most people don't think to drink avocado. Once they try this, they don't go back. Creamy, bright, surprisingly addictive.
products.pairing: Meal replacement, gym day, late breakfast.

products.name: Guyabano Delight
products.tagline: Soursop, strawberry and pineapple — rare and ripe.
products.story: Soursop is hard to find and harder to press well. Mr. Samuel sources ours personally from a single grower in the South-West.
products.pairing: Quiet evenings. Late-night reading.

products.name: Vitamin Vibe
products.tagline: Turmeric, ginger and citrus in a carrot-pineapple base.

ingredient_details.name: Carrot
ingredient_details.benefit: Beta-carotene for clear skin and sharp eyes.

products.story: A daily wellness blend built around fresh turmeric and ginger root — never powder. Carrot rounds out the bite; lemon lifts it.
products.pairing: Sip first thing in the morning before food.

products.name: Ginger Mint Splash
products.tagline: Pineapple, ginger and a cool finish of mint leaf.

ingredient_details.name: Mint Leaf
ingredient_details.benefit: Soothes the stomach, cools the head.

products.story: Bright pineapple meets a clean ginger snap, finished with hand-torn mint. A bottle built for Lagos afternoons.
products.pairing: After a heavy meal, or with grilled suya.

products.name: Zesty Sunrise
products.tagline: Apple, orange and pineapple sharpened with lemon and ginger.

ingredient_details.name: Orange
ingredient_details.benefit: Vitamin C — immunity and morning lift.

products.story: Our brightest morning bottle. Five fruits that argue beautifully — apple sweetens, lemon sharpens, ginger lingers.
products.pairing: Breakfast, school runs, early meetings.

products.name: Veggie Burst
products.tagline: Beetroot, ugu and celery balanced with ginger and pineapple.

ingredient_details.name: Beetroot
ingredient_details.benefit: Iron and nitrates for blood and stamina.

products.story: Built around ugu — the fluted pumpkin leaf Nigerian grandmothers swear by. Pineapple keeps it drinkable; beetroot keeps it serious.
products.pairing: Mid-morning, or after a hard training session.

products.name: Lemon Sip
products.tagline: Lemon, ginger and cucumber — the cleanest sip on the menu.
products.story: Three ingredients, zero sugar, maximum reset. A small-batch bottle pressed on order — preorder required.
products.pairing: First thing in the morning, or as an afternoon reset.

products.name: Sweet Pepper Splash
products.tagline: Tomato, bell pepper and pineapple — savoury meets sweet.

ingredient_details.name: Bell Pepper
ingredient_details.benefit: Vitamin C and gentle natural sweetness.

products.story: Our most polarising bottle on first sip — and our most repeated order by week two. Tomato and bell pepper press into something Lagos has never tasted.
products.pairing: Brunch. Or alongside grilled fish at sunset.

products.name: Melongrape
products.tagline: Watermelon, grapes and carrot in one cool pour.

ingredient_details.name: Carrot
ingredient_details.benefit: Beta-carotene for clear skin and sharp eyes.

products.story: An unlikely trio that landed on the menu after a Saturday family taste-test. Won every round.
products.pairing: Hot afternoons. Picnic baskets. Sunday lunch.

products.name: Creamy Paradise
products.tagline: Strawberry, banana and pineapple — smooth, ripe, indulgent.
products.story: The bottle that wins over juice-sceptics on the first sip. Banana brings the body; strawberry brings the moment.
products.pairing: After-school treat or weekend dessert swap.

products.name: Nourish Blend
products.tagline: Beetroot, mango, carrot and watermelon — full-spectrum nourishment.

ingredient_details.name: Beetroot
ingredient_details.benefit: Iron and nitrates for blood and stamina.

ingredient_details.name: Carrot
ingredient_details.benefit: Beta-carotene for clear skin and sharp eyes.

products.story: Four roots and fruits that read like a multivitamin and drink like a dessert. Built for postpartum mums and tired professionals in equal measure.
products.pairing: Mid-afternoon. After workouts. Any tired day.

products.name: Tropical Mango
products.tagline: Sun-ripe Nigerian mango with a pineapple lift.
products.story: Pressed only when mango season is at its loudest. Two ingredients, no compromise.
products.pairing: Sunday brunch, beach days, summer mornings.

products.name: Pure Green
products.tagline: Cucumber, spinach, celery, kale and apple — the clean reset.
products.story: Five greens, one honest apple. The bottle we drink on the days we want to feel lighter by evening.
products.pairing: Empty stomach in the morning, or alongside a light salad.
